report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Staked Crypto ETFs Guide 2026 (BlackRock ETHB, Bitwise BSOL, fee/yield analysis) and SEC-CFTC MOU Crypto Guide (March 11 landmark agreement explainer) — with full SEO, structured data, cross-linking, and FAQ schemas. Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Staked crypto ETFs: BlackRock ETHB launched Mar 12 on Nasdaq ($15.5M day-1 volume, ~$100M AUM), stakes 70-95% ETH via Coinbase Prime, ~2.5% net yield after 18% staking fee + 0.25% mgmt fee
Bitwise BSOL leading staked ETF category at $717M AUM, ~5.5-6.5% net SOL staking yield. VanEck VSOL at ~$340M. Over 130 crypto ETF filings under SEC review
SEC-CFTC MOU signed Mar 11, 2026: binding inter-agency agreement formally classifying BTC and ETH as digital commodities. Covers joint enforcement, policymaking, data sharing
MOU is NOT legislation (can be revised by future admin). Clarity Act stalled at ~18% passage odds. CFTC developing non-custodial software guidance for DeFi
GENIUS Act (Jul 2025) + MOU create two-pillar regulatory framework: stablecoins + digital asset classification. Enabling staked ETFs, institutional DeFi, DAO-to-corp transitions
Key market context: BTC at ~$71K, Bitcoin dominance 58.16%, Circle (USDC) up 100% in month, Wells Fargo filed WFUSD trademark, Mastercard crypto partner program (85+ companies)

sections.title: Content Created
items: Staked Crypto ETFs Guide 2026 (~580 lines, ~3400 words): 10 sections covering what/how/top funds/fees+yield math/vs direct staking/risks/tax/retirement accounts/future pipeline, 6 FAQs, comparison table of 5 staked ETFs, BlackRock ETHB + Bitwise BSOL spotlights

SEC-CFTC MOU Crypto Guide (~520 lines, ~3200 words): 10 sections covering what happened/MOU mechanics/asset classification/DeFi impact/ETF impact/stablecoins/MOU vs Clarity Act/limitations/investor actions, 6 FAQs, regulatory timeline, classification table

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Staked ETFs: title 57 chars, primary keyword 'staked crypto ETF', 12 secondary keywords, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG article type
SEC-CFTC MOU: title 58 chars, primary keyword 'SEC CFTC MOU', 12 secondary keywords, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG article type
Both pages: OpenGraph + Twitter cards, canonical URLs, Breadcrumb navigation, 6 internal links each (cross-linked to each other + existing ETF/regulation guides)
Cross-linking: Staked ETFs guide links to staking-apy, dca-calculator, portfolio-tracker, consensus-mechanisms, crypto-etfs-complete-guide, clarity-act-crypto-guide
Cross-linking: MOU guide links to clarity-act-crypto-guide, crypto-regulations-2026, staked-crypto-etfs-guide-2026, portfolio-tracker, pnl-calculator, defi-lending
Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts (Day 49 batch)

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript check: 0 errors in src/ files (skipLibCheck). Both pages compile clean
No interactive components needed (content-heavy learn guides with static tables, info boxes, and comparison data)
Both pages follow established learn guide pattern: metadata export, StructuredData component, Breadcrumb, category/difficulty badges, ToC, numbered H2 sections, FAQ section, related articles

report.interactive_components_rationale: Both pages are educational learn guides — static comparison tables, yield math breakdowns, and info boxes embedded in JSX serve the content well. Existing /tools/ links (staking-apy, dca-calculator, portfolio-tracker, tax-calculator, pnl-calculator) provide all calculator utility needed.
